news.headline: Youdao reveals new AI-equipped Dictionary Pen X7 at CES 2025, highlights Chinese AI strength in education.
news.summary: At CES 2025 in Las Vegas, Youdao, a prominent Chinese intelligent learning company, unveiled the Youdao Dictionary Pen X7 series, equipped with AI technology. This demonstration highlights the prowess of 'Chinese AI' at the event, underscoring the company's innovation. The device stands out as a prime example of cutting-edge technology, emphasizing China's advancements in AI development on a global platform.

news.headline: 2024 saw growth in crypto industry with blockchain breakthroughs, Bitcoin surges amid favorable regulations; HTX 2025 outlook covers 5 sectors.
news.summary: In Singapore on January 10, 2025, the crypto industry in 2024 experienced notable advancements. Breakthroughs in blockchain technology and significant increases in Bitcoin price were witnessed. Additionally, a more accommodating regulatory landscape emerged, fostering growth in cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: CKGSB Professor Jin Zhao is the first Chinese business school scholar to win the AFA Award at the 2025 Annual Meeting in San Francisco.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Professor JIN Zhao, an Assistant Professor of Finance at Cheung Kong Graduate School of Business (CKGSB), was recognized with the prestigious Brattle Group Prize - Distinguished Papers during the 2025 American Finance Association (AFA) Annual Meeting in San Francisco.

news.headline: CoreWeave boosts board with Karen Boone appointment, adding corporate governance expertise.
news.summary: Karen Boone has joined CoreWeave as an independent board director, bringing valuable corporate governance expertise to the company. This strategic addition aims to strengthen CoreWeave's leadership team and drive growth.

news.headline: PCI Biotech grants share options to new CSO Morten Luhr; former CSO Anders Høgset becomes Scientific Advisor.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, PCI Biotech (OSE: PCIB) revealed that Morten Luhr has received share options after being named Chief Scientific Officer. Luhr took on the role in January 2025, while the previous CSO, Anders Høgset, will transition to a Scientific Advisor position with a 20% commitment.

news.headline: Mischler Financial Group appoints Andrew Cherna as Managing Director, Capital Markets. Veteran-owned bank aims to deepen relationships.
news.summary: Mischler Financial Group, the oldest diversity-certified investment bank in the U.S. owned and operated by service-disabled veterans, has appointed Andrew Cherna as the Managing Director, Capital Markets. In this new role, Mr. Cherna will report to Rob Karr, the Head of Capital Markets, to enhance connections with issuers and investors. The company aims to broaden its capabilities in the market with this appointment.

news.headline: Philippine banks team up to introduce PHPX stablecoin on Hedera for fast remittances and cross-border payments.
news.summary: Banks in the Philippines have come together to introduce the PHPX stablecoin, designed to facilitate instant remittances. This initiative will utilize Hedera's distributed ledger technology (DLT) network and efficient cross-border payment systems. The collaboration aims to streamline the remittance process, ensuring faster transactions for users.

news.headline: Biggest US and Canada Bitcoin ETFs: Canadian investors shifting to US, causing record outflows in Canada.
news.summary: Investors in the Canadian spot Bitcoin ETF have been shifting towards more liquid US options, leading to record outflows from crypto ETFs in Canada. The significant movement of investors has resulted in the largest outflows in the country's history, with substantial numbers transitioning to US alternatives.

news.headline: Dow surges over 100 points post Fed minutes; Investor sentiment declines, Fear and Greed index remains in 'Fear' zone.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in market sentiment, remaining in the "Fear" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks saw mostly positive results, with the Dow Jones index climbing over 100 points. The Federal Reserve's December meeting minutes revealed uncertainty regarding future rate cuts, with a careful eye on President-elect Donald Trump's policies and their potential impact on inflation. Acuity Brands Inc. (NYSE:AYI) reported lower revenue than expected for its fiscal first quarter. In economic news, U.S. private businesses added 122,000 workers to their payrolls in December, a decrease from previous numbers. For more detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Earnings on Jan. 10, 2025:- Constellation Brands: $3.32 EPS, $2.54B revenue- E2open Parent Holdings: $0.05 EPS, $161M revenue- Neogen: Results pending.
news.summary: Several companies are scheduled to report their quarterly earnings before the bell, including:- Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) is expected to announce earnings of $3.32 per share with revenue totaling $2.54 billion.- E2open Parent Holdings (NYSE:ETWO) is forecasted to report earnings of $0.05 per share on revenue of $161.00 million.- Neogen (NASDAQ:NEOG) is also expected to reveal its quarterly earnings, with further details available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: U.S. Bancorp to release Q4 results on Jan. 16. Predicted earnings: $1.05/share, revenue: $6.99B, up from $6.73B last year. Shares fell 0.4% to $48.52.
news.summary: Before the opening bell on Thursday, Jan. 16, U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) is set to reveal its fourth-quarter financial results. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $1.05 per share for the Minneapolis-based company, marking a significant increase from the 49 cents per share reported in the same period last year. U.S. Bancorp is expecting quarterly revenue to reach $6.99 billion, up from $6.73 billion in the prior year. In the third quarter, the company exceeded expectations with adjusted earnings per share of $1.03, surpassing the consensus estimate of 99 cents. Despite this positive outlook, U.S. Bancorp shares closed at $48.52 on Wednesday, reflecting a 0.4% decrease. For those interested, additional analyst ratings can be found on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

Revenue for this quarter amounted to $1.3 million, on par with the preceding quarter of fiscal year 2024. Additionally, the GAAP net loss attributed to SemiLEDs stockholders in the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 dropped to $54.

news.headline: Masterwork Automodules presenting solutions at NRF 2025 to cut cash-handling costs by 41%, easing retail challenges.
news.summary: In Taipei on January 10, 2025, it was reported that cash management continues to be a significant issue in the retail sector, causing inefficiencies, expensive mistakes, and higher security risks. Studies indicate that implementing cash automation systems can lower cash-handling expenses by as much as 41%.

news.headline: NCCN collaborates at Riyadh symposium with MENA oncology professionals to enhance cancer care. 2-day event.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, a two-day symposium gathered top oncology experts from the MENA region to discuss updated treatment guidelines. The event took place on January 10, 2025, with the National Comprehensive Cancer Network® (NCCN®), a global non-profit organization, hosting.

news.headline: Adapting journalism as AI becomes prevalent; key changes expected in news production.
Smart food packaging market estimated at $26.42B in 2024, projected to reach $35.69B by 2029, CAGR of 6.2%.
news.summary: A report released by MarketsandMarkets™ indicates that the smart food packaging market was valued at approximately $26.42 billion in 2024 and is expected to increase to around $35.69 billion by 2029, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.2% during the forecast period. The study titled 'Active...' reveals these projections for the industry's growth trajectory over the next five years.

news.headline: JW Therapeutics receives Breakthrough Therapy Designation for Carteyva® in China for adult Large B-cell Lymphoma.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, JW Therapeutics (HKEx: 2126), a leading biotech company, shared news about its specialization in developing, producing, and selling cell immunotherapy products. The company outlined its focus on innovation and independence in this sector. The announcement highlighted its collaboration with the Center for Drug Evaluation (CDE) of the National Medical Authority.

Largest US Bitcoin ETFs attract Canadian investors, leading to record outflows from Canada's crypto ETF market.
news.summary: Investors in Canada's spot Bitcoin ETF have shifted towards more liquid US options, leading to the highest outflow of crypto ETFs in Canadian history.

news.headline: AAC Technologies showcased automotive solutions at CES 2025, focusing on acoustics, haptics, sensing, and image recognition.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on January 10, 2025, AAC Technologies exhibited its industry dominance at CES 2025. The company unveiled a comprehensive range of automotive solutions, covering acoustics, haptics, sensing, and image recognition technologies.

news.headline: Activate Data Availability Layer for Tezos rollups for 20-4000x better transaction bandwidth, urges community.
news.summary: Tezos supporters are being urged to activate the Data Availability Layer, a crucial technology for enhancing the scalability of rollups. This advancement is expected to bring about a significant improvement in transaction bandwidth, with estimates suggesting a surge in performance ranging from 20 times to as high as 4000 times the current levels.

news.headline: Increase in revenue and operating profit forecasts.
China Commerce Ministry: China to impose anti-dumping tariffs on US and South Korea solar-grade polysilicon from January 14th.
European stock futures drop as investors await US jobs data; global markets nervous.
Huawei, IUCN, and KWS collaborate for Tech4Nature project to safeguard Kenya's coral reefs and biodiversity at Kisite-Mpunguti Marine Park.
news.summary: In Nairobi, Kenya, on January 10, 2025, Huawei, the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN), and the Kenya Wildlife Service (KWS) announced the initiation of the Tech4Nature initiative. This project aims to safeguard the coral reef and biodiversity within Kenya's Kisite-Mpunguti Marine Park. The collaboration will involve the use of technology to monitor and protect the marine environment. The specific details of the project, including the financial investment and expected outcomes, were not disclosed at the time of the announcement.

news.headline: US manufacturing activity in Dec rose to a 9-month high at 49.3%, exceeding economists’ expectations of 48.4%.
news.summary: After a significant period of contraction in 2024, there are positive signs emerging from the U.S. manufacturing sector. Data released by the Institute for Supply Management on Friday indicated that the Manufacturing Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) increased to 49.3% in December, up from 48.4% in November. This exceeded the anticipated 48.4% and represents the highest reading since April 2024. It also marks the second consecutive month of improvement in the PMI, a trend that has not been observed since September 2023. However, the index remains below the crucial 50% threshold that distinguishes expansion from contraction. This indicates the ninth consecutive month, out of the last 27, in contraction territory. Despite the overall contraction, certain sub-indices show promising trends that suggest a potential shift in momentum.

news.headline: Indian exchange WazirX plans to bounce back from $235M cyberattack with Singapore-supported restructuring after July 2024.
news.summary: In the aftermath of a devastating cyberattack in July 2024 that resulted in a loss of $235 million, WazirX has taken steps to revamp its operations with the support of a restructuring program backed by Singapore. This move signals the company's determination to bounce back from the breach and strengthen its cybersecurity measures.

David Schilansky is appointed CFO of Ariceum Therapeutics, focusing on radiopharmaceuticals for cancer treatment.
news.summary: Ariceum Therapeutics, a private biotech firm working on radiopharmaceutical products for diagnosing and treating difficult cancers, named David Schilansky as their new Chief Financial Officer on Jan. 10, 2025.

Airbus successfully delivered 766 jets in 2024, despite a slow start.
Kevitsa's Mineral Resources and Reserves updated, show tonnage increase; Boliden provides grade guidance for 2025.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Boliden released new figures for Mineral Resources and Mineral Reserves at Kevitsa following thorough mineralization studies. The updated data reveals a rise in tonnage for both categories. The revised estimates reflect a significant increase in the overall volume of mineral resources and reserves at Kevitsa.

Financial advisors are more interested in crypto post US election. 2025 survey shows rise in allocations and client interest.
news.summary: Results from the 2025 Bitwise/VettaFi Benchmark Survey indicate a significant increase in interest from financial advisors towards crypto investments. The survey shows a noticeable uptick in both allocations and client interest in this asset class. The findings suggest a growing enthusiasm among financial advisors for cryptocurrencies as a viable investment option, reflecting a shifting trend in the financial industry.

news.headline: XRP's price may plummet 40% due to bearish signals and increased selling by large holders by February.
news.summary: XRP is potentially facing a significant drop of 40% by February due to bearish technical indicators and evidence pointing towards increased selling activity by large investors.

news.headline: Aetina Corp partners with Qualcomm to enhance edge AI with new solutions; Qualcomm introduces AI On-Prem Appliance.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Taipei, it was reported that Aetina Corporation, a prominent company specializing in edge AI solutions and a subsidiary of Innodisk Group, has entered into a partnership with Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. The collaboration involves the introduction of Qualcomm's groundbreaking Qualcomm® AI On-Prem Appliance Solution. This collaboration is significant in the field of AI, as it combines the expertise of two industry leaders to bring cutting-edge AI solutions to the market.

news.headline: Stocks to watch: Delta Air Lines may report earnings of $1.76/share on $14.21B revenue before market opens.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stock futures are down, drawing attention to specific stocks for potential investor interest today:Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE:DAL) is expected to announce earnings of $1.76 per share with a revenue of $14.21 billion by Wall Street before the market opens. In after-hours trading, Delta Air Lines shares rose by 0.2% to reach $61.57.Furthermore, analysts are anticipating insights on TD Synnex Corp. as well. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Vietnam's youth embrace blockchain: KuCoin shares insights from survey at VTIS 2024 with 926 participants.
news.summary: In HANOI, Vietnam, as of January 10, 2025, KuCoin, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, released insights from its recent KuCoin Campus Survey. This survey, the second of its kind, took place amid the Vietnam Technology & Investment Summit (VTIS) in 2024 and involved 926 participants.
